about.title: VR3D
about.subtitle: ENGINEERING
about.heading: About Us
about.p1: VR3D is an engineering studio from Argentina, dedicated to the development of architectural building projects and general civil works.
about.p2: Our goal is to contribute to building a sustainable future through the rational and efficient use of energy, sustainable construction, and the development of distributed electrical energy generation projects.

items.ingenieria: Development of Basic and Detailed Engineering
items.solar: Design and Execution of Solar Photovoltaic Installations

contact.heading: Contact Us
contact.description: Do you have any questions? Write to us and we will get back to you as soon as possible.

workWithUs.heading: Work with us
workWithUs.description: We are a growing team. If you want to be part of it, we would love to meet you.
